description.en-US:
AutoClicker, an innovative tool designed for automating repetitive mouse clicking tasks, is a must-have for a wide range of users, including testers, developers, enthusiastic gamers, and general users.

In the gaming community, AutoClicker has made a significant impact. It eliminates the necessity of constant mouse clicking in various types of games, including idle, incremental, or clicker games such as Minecraft and Roblox.

For those who engage in RPG games, AutoClicker offers relief from the physical strain caused by intensive gameplay. By setting a custom click speed, gamers can optimize their gameplay, quickly achieve their gaming goals, and advance through game levels with ease.

Highlighted Features:

Gaming Enhancement: Obtain an edge in your preferred clicker and RPG games with AutoClicker's ability to simulate rapid mouse clicks, giving players a competitive advantage.

Adjustable Click Speeds: Tailor your clicking speed, ranging from slow to ultra-fast, with this Chrome-based click automation tool.

Precision Click Point Selection: Ensure accuracy by selecting specific points on your screen for the tool to click.

Automated Click Sequences: Streamline complex tasks with pre-determined click sequences, improving both gaming and work efficiencies.

Timed Clicks: Set up clicks at regular intervals, ideal for tasks that require repetitive actions.

Easy-to-Use Interface: Experience hassle-free navigation with AutoClicker's user-friendly design, making it accessible for all users.

summary.en-US:
AutoClicker is designed to automate repetitive clicking tasks. Perfect for testers, developers, avid gamers, and regular users, AutoClicker is your go-to tool for automated clicks.

Best autoclicker for games like Roblox & Minecraft for PC.

description.de:
<b>Live-Vorschau beim Bewegen der Maus über Twitch- & YouTube-Streams | Eine Reihe von Funktionen zur Verbesserung der Lebensqualität</b> Previews (For TTV & YT) erstellt ein Live-Video oder eine Vorschaubild, wenn du mit der Maus über Kanäle auf Twitch & YouTube fährst und bietet eine Reihe von Funktionen zur Verbesserung der Lebensqualität für beide Plattformen.
  • Aktualisiere die geöffneten TTV- und YT-Tabs nach dem Hinzufügen der Erweiterung.
Schau dir die vielen Funktionen an, die das Benutzererlebnis auf Twitch und YouTube erheblich verbessern: <b>Funktionen (einzeln aktivierbar):</b> <b>* Twitch:</b> - Vorschaubild/-video in der Seitenleiste und in Kanalübersichten - Einstellbare Größe und Lautstärke der Vorschau - Streaming: Sehe dein eigenes Livestream-Thumbnail an, wie es von den Zuschauern auf Twitch gesehen wird - Markiere Kanäle als Favoriten und sortiere die Seitenleiste in übersichtliche Kategorien - Füge deine YouTube-Kanalliste der Seitenleiste hinzu - Multi-Stream und Multi-Chat - Transparentes / dynamisches Chat-Overlay - Vollbild mit Chat-Modus - Auto-Kanal-Punkte-Klicker - Clip-Downloader - Automatische Aktualisierung bei Abspielfehlern (#1000, #2000, #3000, #4000) - Benachrichtigung zu Vorhersagen, wenn du es nicht mitbekommen würdest (z. B. wenn der Chat geschlossen ist oder du dich nicht im Tab oder Browser befindest) - Vorhersagenscharfschütze (wird für dich an Vorhersagen teilnehmen) - Verhindert die automatische Änderung der Videoqualität - Spule Streams mit den Pfeiltasten der Tastatur - Schneller Stream-Vorlauf - Screenshot vom Stream - FlashBang Schutz - Chat leeren - Inkognito-Chat - Benutzerdefiniertes Bild in Bild mit der Schaltfläche unter der Zuschauerzahl in der Seitenleiste - Automatisches Erweitern der Seitenleiste, um alle Live-Streamer anzuzeigen (wenn die Seitenleiste geöffnet ist) - Seitenleisten-Stream-Suche: Ein violettes Suchfeld oben in der Seitenleiste, um Live-Streamer in der Seitenleiste leicht zu finden - Alle Seitenleistenabschnitte mit Ausnahme der gefolgten Kanäle ausblenden - Stummschalten der automatischen Wiedergabe von Videos auf verschiedenen Seiten - Erweiterte Video-Einbettungen - Overlay von TTV Erweiterungen ausblenden - Tastaturkürzel für wichtige Funktionen - Unterstützt auch invertiertes Layout (wenn der Chat links und Streamer rechts ist) <b>* Youtube:</b> - Bild- oder Live-Videostream-Vorschau in der Seitenleiste - Vorschaugröße und Lautstärkeregelung - Automatisch die YouTube-Qualität auf die ausgewählte Einstellung setzen - Theater / Vollbild mit Chat-Modus - Multi-Stream und Multi-Chat - Transparentes / dynamisches Chat-Overlay - Screenshot vom Stream - FlashBang Schutz - Steuerung der Wiedergabegeschwindigkeit - Gehe direkt von der Seitenleiste zu Live-Streams - Zeigt die aktuelle Zuschauerzahl von Livestreams in der Seitenleiste an - Benutzerdefiniertes Bild im Bild über die Schaltfläche auf der Kanalkarte in der Seitenleiste - Video Click-to-Pause/Wiedergabe verhindern - Schaltfläche "URL zum aktuellen Zeitpunkt kopieren" - Tastaturkürzel für wichtige Funktionen - Unterstützt auch das Layout von rechts nach links (RTL)
  • Um eine Funktionseinstellung zu ändern, klicke auf die Erweiterung in der oberen Leiste, und öffne das Optionsmenü der Erweiterung.
Wie man es verwendet: 1. Füge die Erweiterung zum Browser hinzu. - Wenn bereits einen TTV- oder YT-Tab geöffnet ist, aktualisiere diese Tabs.
  1. Fahre mit der Maus über einen Streamer in der Seitenleiste / in den Kanalübersichten
  2. Eine Vorschau des Streams wird daneben als Overlay angezeigt.
© MarkM. Diese Erweiterung ist nicht Teil von twitch.tv oder youtube.com.
description.en-US:
Live hover previews for Twitch & YouTube & Kick | A bunch of quality of life improvements for Twitch & YouTube & Kick Previews (For Twitch & YouTube & Kick) creates a live video or image preview when hovering over streams and offers a bunch of quality of life improvement features for the three platforms. Check the features list below for more quality of life improvement features. Features: * Twitch: - Image or live video stream previews in the sidebar & directories. - Preview resize & volume control. - Clips Previews. - Streaming: See your own live stream thumbnail as seen by viewers. - Sidebar Favorite Channels List. - Sidebar YouTube Channels List. - Sidebar Kick Channels List. - Multi Stream & Multi Chat. - Auto Set Player Quality. - Transparent / Dynamic Chat Overlay. - Full Screen With Chat Mode. - Auto Channel Points Clicker. - Clip Downloader. - Auto Refresh on player errors (#1000, #2000, #3000, #4000, #5000). - Predictions Notifications when you don't know it's happening (for example if your chat is closed or you are not in the tab or browser). - Predictions Sniper (will participate in predictions for you). - Prevent Automatic Video Quality Change. - Seek Streams Using Keyboard Arrow Keys. - Fast-Forward Stream. - Screenshot Stream. - FlashBang Defender. - Prevent raids or Raid to a Previews Favorite instead. - Clear Chat Button. - Incognito Chat. - Custom Picture In Picture. - Auto Extend the sidebar to show all live streamers (when sidebar is open). - Sidebar Stream Search: A purple search button at the top of the sidebar to find live streamers easily in the sidebar. - Hide All Sidebar Sections Except The Followed Channels. - Full Sidebar Channel Tooltips. - Mute Auto-Playing Videos In Various Pages. - Advanced Video Embeds. - Hide TTV Extensions Overlays. - Hide Volume Percentage Indicator. - Keyboard shortcuts for applicable features. - Also supports inverted layout (when chat is on the left and streamers on the right). * YouTube: - Image or live video stream previews in the sidebar. - Preview resize & volume control. - Sidebar Favorite Channels List. - Sidebar Kick Channels List. - Auto Set YouTube Player Quality. - Theater / Full Screen With Chat Mode. - Multi Stream & Multi Chat. - Transparent / Dynamic Chat Overlay. - Fast-Forward Stream. - Screenshot Stream. - FlashBang Defender. - Player Playback Speed Controls. - Go Directly To Live Streams From The Sidebar. - Show Live Streamers' View-Count In The Sidebar. - Custom Picture In Picture. - Prevent Video Click-To-Pause / Play. - Copy URL At Current Time Button. - Auto Theater Mode. - Auto Hide Chat. - Keyboard shortcuts for applicable features. - Also supports Right-To-Left (RTL) layout. * Kick: - Image or live video stream previews in the sidebar & directories. - Preview resize & volume control. - Sidebar Favorite Channels List. - Multi Stream & Multi Chat. - Full Screen With Chat Mode. - Prevent Automatic Video Quality Change. - Seek Streams Using Keyboard Arrow Keys. - Fast-Forward Stream. - Screenshot Stream. - FlashBang Defender. - Player Playback Speed Controls. - Custom Picture In Picture. - Hide All Sidebar Sections Except The Followed Channels. - Keyboard shortcuts for applicable features. - Hide Volume Percentage Indicator.
  • To change any feature setting click the extension at the top bar to open the extension's options menu.
How to use: 1. Add the extension to your browser. - If you already have a TTV or YT tab opened - refresh it.
  1. Hover your mouse over a streamer on the sidebar / directories.
  2. A preview will appear next to the hovered stream.
Feature Notes: ** Stream Previews - Live image and video previews when hovering over streams in the sidebar and directories. ** Streaming - see your own live stream thumbnail - Shows your own stream's live thumbnail preview, as seen by viewers, when hovering over the logo at the top left. ** Multi Stream & Multi Chat - You can add Multi-Stream and Multi-Chat on the fly to any page you're on directly from the sidebar or via the top search bar (if the Multi-Stream feature is enabled). - There is also a button that is located next to the stream uptime under the stream. - Clicking it will start Multi Stream on a new twitch.tv tab - so you can still enjoy the benefits of the sidebar and the search function at the top bar. - In the new Multi-Stream tab, add a stream from the sidebar or search for a stream at the top search bar and click the Multi-Stream button in the results to add the stream. - You can scroll the page, change background color & transparency, font color, weight, increase/decrease size, fullscreen, drag, resize and minimize the boxes (top bar and bottom right corner of the boxes). - If the Auto Channel Points feature is enabled, it will collect points in the chat box. - If you enable the 'Sidebar YouTube Channels' features, you can also add their streams to the Multi-Stream and use it cross-platform. ** Full Screen With Chat - The button will show next to the 'theater mode' or 'fullscreen' button in the player controls. - Hovering over it will show two options: Full Screen with Custom chat overlay or Default Chat. - The Custom chat will automatically position itself over the video to the right and stretch to screen height. - You can resize, move it around, align to each side and change styles with the controls at the top of the chat box. - The Custom chat's settings (position, size, colors, etc..) will be saved for the current page session. - Exit the mode by clicking the button again or just by exiting fullscreen. ** Sidebar Favorite Channels - A new Favorites list at the top of the sidebar (for your most favorite streamers). - Add streams to your favorites list by clicking the Favorites button next to the bell under the stream. - The list will show only the currently live streams in your favorites list. - Note: the feature relies on the followed channels list, so it will auto-expand (show more) when the sidebar is opened. if it's closed, the list will still populate but will be partial. - Note: it might take a few seconds for the list to show or update. ** Sidebar YouTube Channels - A new list at the top of the Twitch sidebar to show your subscribed YT channels that are currently live. - The list data will update every 15 minutes. - Supported by the Custom Picture-In-Picture and Multi-Stream & Multi-Chat features so you can use the Multi-Stream cross-platform. - You need to be logged in to YT on your browser (just go to youtube.com and login if you aren't already). ** Auto Channel Points Clicker - This feature automatically clicks the green channel points redeem button. - It also works when chat is closed and when the tab or window is in the background. ** Clip Downloader - The button will show in the player controls of clips. ** Sidebar Stream Search - A purple search button on the top of the sidebar to find live streamers easily. - Searches within the currently shown streamers so the sidebar will automatically extend to show all live streamers when you start searching. ** Sidebar Extend - Auto extends the sidebar to show all live streamers (when sidebar is open). ** Hide All Sidebar Sections Except The Followed Channels - Hides all the other sections in the sidebar except the followed channels. ** Mute Auto-Playing Videos In Various Pages - Mutes the auto-playing video players in various pages. ** Native Picture In Picture - The button will show next to the 'theater mode' button in the player controls. - Clicking it will start the browser's Picture In Picture for the current stream. ** Custom Picture In Picture - A small button will appear under the view count when you hover a streamer - click it and a persistent preview window will appear (you can add as many as you like). ** Auto Refresh On Player Error (#1000, #2000, #3000, #4000) - Refreshes the player if an error occurs. ** Prevent Automatic Video Quality Change When In Background - Prevents automatic video quality change when the player is in the background (when switching tabs / tasks). - Prevents 99% of player errors (#1000, #2000). ** Seek Streams Using Keyboard Arrow Keys - Seeks 5 seconds back or forward using the keyboard left/right arrow keys. - Note: the buffer size varies between 0 seconds to two minutes. ** Fast-Forward Stream - Useful if your stream is delayed. - The button will show in the player controls next to the 'play/pause' button. - Click it to fast-forward the stream to the latest point in the buffer. ** Screenshot Stream - The button will show in the player controls. - You can capture multiple screenshots and then save only the ones you like. - The screenshots are captured at the same resolution as the stream. ** FlashBang Defender - For when it's late night and the streamer opens a white screen. - Toggles a semi-transparent overlay on top of the stream. - The button will show in the player controls. ** Clear Chat Button - The button will show under the chat. - Clears all the messages in chat. ** Predictions Notifications - Predictions started and Predictions results notifications when you don't know it's happening (for example if your chat is closed or you are not in the tab or browser). ** Predictions Sniper - The predictions sniper will participate in predictions for you. - The sniper will choose the prediction option with the most amount of votes received at the time of entry (x seconds before prediction closes). - If you have your chat open (no need), you will see the prediction menu for a split second when the sniper is entering a prediction. - You can enable the 'Predictions notifications' feature if you want to know what's happening in real-time. - If there is already a bet made on the prediction, the sniper will not add more points. - To change Sniper settings for individual streams, click the Sniper settings button under the chat. -- Default Settings: - Bet % - the percentage of channel points you want the sniper to bet. - Max num of points - the maximum amount of points the sniper is allowed to vote with. - Min vote margin % - a percentage representation of the minimum required vote margin between the two prediction options for the sniper to participate. -- For example: option A- 100 votes, option B- 115 votes, vote spread: A-46.51% B-53.49%, vote margin: 6.98% (53.49% - 46.51%). if the minimum vote margin is lower than 6.98%, the sniper will participate in the prediction. - Seconds - the amount of seconds the sniper will make a prediction before the prediction closes (min 2s). - Remember that this is a statistical tool and wins are not guaranteed. ** Advanced Video Embeds - This applies to the Multi-Stream feature and on-the-fly video embeds (not previews). - Bypasses purple screen. - Adds enabled features to embeds (seek, fast-forward, auto-refresh, picture-in-picture, fullscreen with custom chat, flashbang defender, stream screenshot). - Seeking using the keyboard arrow keys in these embeds will be in 1.5 seconds intervals instead of the normal 5 seconds to allow easier streams synchronization for Multi-Stream. - Note: this feature will use more resources when using said embeds. if you notice performance issues you can turn this feature off. - Note: if you're using a different extension that replaces the main player, you might still experience a purple screen. ** Go Directly To Live Streams From The Sidebar - Goes to a channel's live stream directly from the sidebar instead of the channel's home directory. - Only on live channels. ** Show Live Streamers' View-Count In The Sidebar - Shows live streamers' view-count on their card in the sidebar. ** Player Playback Speed Controls - Increase, Decrease and Reset the video playback speed. ** Prevent Video Click-To-Pause / Play - Prevents the video from pausing / playing when clicking on it. ** Copy URL At Current Time Button - Opens a small box with the URL to the video at the current time. - Useful in live streams where this is not possible by default. © MarkM. - If you are a content creator or a developer in the sphere, have a look at the Affiliates Program -> https://previews-app.com/affiliate - this extension is not affiliated with any of the companies mentioned or any of their related companies.
description.es-ES:
<b>Vistas previas en vivo al pasar el mouse sobre los canales en Twitch y YouTube | Un montón de mejoras en la calidad de vida</b> Previews (For TTV & YT) crea un video en vivo o una vista previa de la imagen al pasar el mouse sobre los canales en Twitch y YouTube Y ofrece un montón de funciones de mejora de la calidad de vida para ambas plataformas. Consulte la lista de funciones a continuación para obtener más funciones de mejora de la calidad de vida.
  • Actualice las pestañas abiertas de TTV y YT después de agregar la extensión.
<b>Características:</b> <b>* Twitch:</b> - Vistas previas de imágenes o secuencias de video en vivo en la barra lateral y directorios. - Vista previa de cambio de tamaño y control de volumen. - Transmisión: vea su propia miniatura de transmisión en vivo tal como la ven los espectadores. - Lista de canales favoritos de la barra lateral. - Lista de canales de YouTube de la barra lateral. - Multi Stream y Multi Chat. - Superposición de chat transparente / dinámica. - Pantalla completa con modo de chat. - Clicker de puntos de canal automático. - Descargador de clips. - Actualización automática de errores del jugador (# 1000, # 2000, # 3000, # 4000). - Notificaciones de predicciones cuando no sabe que está sucediendo (por ejemplo, si su chat está cerrado o no está en la pestaña o el navegador). - Predictions Sniper (participará en las predicciones por ti). - Evitar el cambio automático de calidad de video. - Busque secuencias con las teclas de flecha del teclado. - Secuencia de avance rápido. - Stream de captura de pantalla. - FlashBang Defender. - Botón de chat claro. - Chat de incógnito. - Imagen en imagen personalizada a través del botón debajo del recuento de vistas en la barra lateral. - Extienda automáticamente la barra lateral para mostrar todas las transmisiones en vivo (cuando la barra lateral está abierta). - Búsqueda de transmisiones en la barra lateral: un botón de búsqueda de color púrpura en la parte superior de la barra lateral para encontrar transmisiones en vivo fácilmente en la barra lateral. - Ocultar todas las secciones de la barra lateral excepto los canales seguidos. - Silenciar videos de reproducción automática en varias páginas. - Incrustaciones de video avanzadas. - Ocultar superposiciones de extensiones de TTV. - Atajos de teclado para funciones aplicables. - También es compatible con el diseño invertido (cuando el chat está a la izquierda y los streamers a la derecha). <b>* YouTube:</b> - Vistas previas de transmisión de imágenes o videos en vivo en la barra lateral. - Vista previa de cambio de tamaño y control de volumen. - Configurar automáticamente el reproductor de YouTube a la calidad seleccionada. - Teatro / Pantalla completa con modo de chat. - Transmisión múltiple y chat múltiple. - Superposición de chat transparente / dinámico. - Secuencia de captura de pantalla. - FlashBang Defensor. - Controles de velocidad de reproducción del reproductor. - Vaya directamente a transmisiones en vivo desde la barra lateral. - Muestra el recuento de vistas de los streamers en vivo en la barra lateral. - Imagen en imagen personalizada a través del botón en la tarjeta de canal en la barra lateral. - Evitar hacer clic para pausar/reproducir video. - Botón Copiar URL en la hora actual. - Atajos de teclado para funciones aplicables. - También es compatible con el diseño de derecha a izquierda (RTL).
  • Para cambiar la configuración de cualquier función, haga clic en la extensión en la barra superior para abrir el menú de opciones de la extensión.
Cómo utilizar: 1. Agregue la extensión a su navegador. - Si ya tiene abierta una pestaña de TTV o YT, actualícela.
  1. Pase el mouse sobre un transmisor en la barra lateral / directorios.
  2. Aparecerá una vista previa al lado de la transmisión sobre el cursor.
© MarkM. esta extensión no está afiliada con twitch.tv o youtube.com.
description.fr:
<b>Aperçus en direct lorsque vous survolez les chaînes sur Twitch & YouTube | Un tas d'améliorations de la qualité de vie pour TTV & YT</b> Previews (For TTV & YT) créent une vidéo ou un aperçu d'image en direct lorsque vous survolez les chaînes sur Twitch et YouTube et offre un tas de fonctionnalités d'amélioration de la qualité de vie pour les deux plates-formes. Consultez la liste des fonctionnalités ci-dessous pour plus de fonctionnalités d'amélioration de la qualité de vie.
  • Actualisez les onglets TTV et YT ouverts après avoir ajouté l'extension.
<b>Caractéristiques:</b> <b>* Twitch:</b> - Aperçus d'images ou de flux vidéo en direct dans la barre latérale et les répertoires. - Aperçu du redimensionnement et du contrôle du volume. - Streaming : voyez votre propre vignette de diffusion en direct telle que vue par les téléspectateurs. - Liste des chaînes préférées de la barre latérale. - Liste des chaînes YouTube de la barre latérale. - Multi Stream & Multi Chat. - Superposition de chat transparente / dynamique. - Plein écran avec mode chat. - Cliqueur de points de canal automatique. - Téléchargeur de clips. - Actualisation automatique en cas d'erreur du joueur (#1000, #2000, #3000, #4000). - Notifications de prédictions lorsque vous ne savez pas que cela se passe (par exemple si votre chat est fermé ou si vous n'êtes pas dans l'onglet ou le navigateur). - Prédictions Sniper (participera aux prédictions pour vous). - Empêcher le changement automatique de la qualité vidéo. - Rechercher des flux à l'aide des touches fléchées du clavier. - Flux d'avance rapide. - Capture d'écran en streaming. - Défenseur FlashBang. - Effacer le bouton de discussion. - Chat en mode navigation privée. - Image personnalisée dans l'image via le bouton sous le nombre de vues dans la barre latérale. - Étendre automatiquement la barre latérale pour afficher tous les streamers en direct (lorsque la barre latérale est ouverte). - Recherche de flux dans la barre latérale: un bouton de recherche violet en haut de la barre latérale pour trouver facilement des streamers en direct dans la barre latérale. - Masquer toutes les sections de la barre latérale à l'exception des chaînes suivies. - Couper le son des vidéos en lecture automatique sur différentes pages. - Intégration vidéo avancée. - Masquer les superpositions d'extensions TTV. - Raccourcis clavier pour les fonctionnalités applicables. - Prend également en charge la disposition inversée (lorsque le chat est à gauche et les streamers à droite). <b>* Youtube:</b> - Aperçus d'images ou de flux vidéo en direct dans la barre latérale. - Prévisualiser le redimensionnement et le contrôle du volume. - Définir automatiquement le lecteur YouTube sur la qualité sélectionnée. - Théâtre / Plein écran avec mode chat. - Multi flux et multi chat. - Superposition de chat transparente / dynamique. - Flux de capture d'écran. - Défenseur FlashBang. - Commandes de vitesse de lecture du lecteur. - Accédez directement aux flux en direct à partir de la barre latérale. - Afficher le nombre de vues des streamers en direct dans la barre latérale. - Image personnalisée dans l'image via le bouton sur la carte de chaîne dans la barre latérale. - Empêcher la vidéo Click-To-Pause / Play. - Copier l'URL à l'heure actuelle. - Raccourcis clavier pour les fonctionnalités applicables. - Prend également en charge la disposition de droite à gauche (RTL).
  • Pour modifier un paramètre de fonctionnalité, cliquez sur l'extension dans la barre supérieure pour ouvrir le menu d'options de l'extension.
Comment utiliser: 1. Ajoutez l'extension à votre navigateur. - Si vous avez déjà ouvert un onglet TTV ou YT, actualisez-le.
  1. Passez votre souris sur un streamer dans la barre latérale / les répertoires.
  2. Un aperçu apparaîtra à côté du flux survolé.
© MarkM. cette extension n'est pas affiliée à twitch.tv ou youtube.com.
description.ja:
<b>Twitch と YouTube のチャンネルにカーソルを合わせたときのライブ プレビュー | TTV と YT の生活の質を向上させる多数の機能</b> Previews (For TTV & YT) は、Twitch と YouTube のチャンネルにカーソルを合わせると、ライブ ビデオまたは画像プレビューを作成し、両方のプラットフォームで生活の質を向上させる機能を多数提供します。 生活の質を向上させるその他の機能については、以下の機能リストを確認してください。
  • 拡張機能を追加した後、開いている TTV & YT タブを更新します。
<b>特徴：</b> <b>* Twitch:</b> - サイドバーとディレクトリでの画像またはライブ ビデオ ストリームのプレビュー。 - プレビューのサイズ変更とボリューム コントロール。 - ストリーミング: 視聴者に見られるように、独自のライブ ストリームのサムネイルを表示します。 - サイドバーのお気に入りチャンネル リスト。 - サイドバーの YouTube チャンネル リスト。 - マルチストリーム & マルチチャット。 - 透明/動的チャット オーバーレイ。 - チャットモードでフルスクリーン。 - 自動チャンネル ポイント クリッカー。 - クリップ ダウンローダー。 - プレーヤー エラーの自動更新 (#1000、#2000、#3000、#4000)。 - 予測 何が起こっているかわからない場合の通知 (たとえば、チャットが閉じられている場合や、タブまたはブラウザーにいない場合)。 - 予測スナイパー (予測に参加します)。 - ビデオ品質の自動変更を防止します。 - キーボードの矢印キーを使用してストリームをシークします。 - 早送りストリーム。 - スクリーンショット ストリーム。 - フラッシュディフェンダー。 - チャットボタンをクリアします。 - シークレット チャット。 - サイドバーのビュー カウントの下にあるボタンを使用して、Picture In Picture をカスタマイズします。 - サイドバーを自動拡張して、すべてのライブ ストリーマーを表示します (サイドバーが開いている場合)。 - サイドバー ストリーム検索: サイドバーの上部にある紫色の検索ボタンで、サイドバーでライブ ストリーマーを簡単に見つけることができます。 - フォローしているチャンネルを除くすべてのサイドバー セクションを非表示にします。 - さまざまなページで自動再生ビデオをミュートします。 - 高度なビデオ埋め込み。 - TTV 拡張オーバーレイを非表示にします。 - 該当する機能のキーボード ショートカット。 - 反転レイアウトにも対応 (チャットが左側、ストリーマーが右側の場合)。 <b>* YouTube:</b> - サイドバーでの画像またはライブ ビデオ ストリームのプレビュー。 - プレビューのサイズ変更とボリューム コントロール。 - YouTubeプレーヤーを選択した画質に自動設定。 - シアター/全画面チャットモード。 - マルチストリーム & マルチチャット。 - 透明/動的チャット オーバーレイ。 - スクリーンショット ストリーム。 - フラッシュバンディフェンダー。 - プレーヤーの再生速度コントロール。 - サイドバーからライブ ストリームに直接移動します。 - サイドバーにライブ ストリーマーのビュー カウントを表示します。 - サイドバーのチャンネル カードのボタンを使用してカスタム ピクチャー イン ピクチャー。 - ビデオのクリックによる一時停止/再生を防止します。 - 現在の時間ボタンで URL をコピーします。 - 該当する機能のキーボード ショートカット。 - 右から左 (RTL) のレイアウトもサポートします。
  • 機能設定を変更するには、上部のバーで拡張機能をクリックして、拡張機能のオプション メニューを開きます。
使い方： 1. ブラウザに拡張機能を追加します。 - すでに TTV または YT タブを開いている場合は、更新してください。
  1. サイドバー / ディレクトリのストリーマーの上にマウスを置きます。
  2. ホバーしたストリームの横にプレビューが表示されます。
© MarkM. この拡張機能は、twitch.tv または youtube.com と提携していません。
description.ko:
<b>Twitch 및 YouTube의 채널 위로 마우스를 가져가면 실시간 미리보기 | TTV 및 YT를 위한 다양한 삶의 질 향상 기능</b> Previews (For TTV & YT) 는 Twitch 및 YouTube의 채널 위로 마우스를 가져가면 라이브 비디오 또는 이미지 미리보기를 생성하고 두 플랫폼 모두에 대한 삶의 질 향상 기능을 제공합니다. 더 많은 삶의 질 향상 기능은 아래 기능 목록을 확인하세요.
  • 확장 프로그램을 추가한 후 열린 TTV 및 YT 탭을 새로 고칩니다.
<b>특징:</b> <b>* Twitch:</b> - 마우스를 이용한 방송 미리 보기 - 스트리밍 - 내 라이브 썸네일 미리보기 - 사이드바 즐겨찾는 채널 - 사이드바 유튜브 채널 - 멀티 창 & 멀티 채팅 - 투명 / 다이내믹 채팅 오버레이 - 전체 화면 + 채팅 버튼 - 채널 포인트 자동으로 받기 - 클립 다운로드 버튼 - 트위치 플레이어 오류 시 자동 새로고침 (#1000, #2000, #3000, #4000) - 예측 알림 - 고스트 도박왕 - 백그라운드에서 자동 비디오 품질 변경 방지 - 키보드 화살표 키를 이용해 방송 탐색하기 - 빨리 감기 버튼 - 방송 스크린샷 버튼 - 눈뽕 방지 버튼 - 채팅 초기화 버튼 - 익명 채팅 버튼 - 사이드바의 조회수 아래에 있는 버튼을 통한 사용자 지정 PIP(Picture In Picture). - 사이드바 자동 확장(자세히 보기) - 사이드바 검색 버튼 - 팔로우한 채널을 제외한 모든 사이드바 섹션 숨기기 - 여러 페이지에서 자동 비디오 음소거 - TTV 확장 오버레이를 숨깁니다. - 해당 기능에 대한 키보드 단축키. - 고오급 비디오 임베드 <b>* YouTube:</b> - 사이드바에서 이미지 또는 라이브 비디오 스트림 미리보기. - 미리보기 크기 조정 및 볼륨 조절. - 유튜브 플레이어를 선택한 품질로 자동 설정. - 채팅 모드가 있는 극장/전체 화면. - 멀티 스트림 및 멀티 채팅. - 투명/동적 채팅 오버레이. - 스크린샷 스트림. - 플래시뱅 수비수. - 플레이어 재생 속도 제어. - 사이드바에서 라이브 스트림으로 바로 이동합니다. - 사이드바에 라이브 스트리머의 조회수를 표시합니다. - 사이드바의 채널 카드에 있는 버튼을 통한 사용자 지정 PIP(Picture In Picture). - 비디오 클릭-투-일시 중지/재생 방지. - 현재 시간에 URL 복사 버튼. - 해당 기능에 대한 키보드 단축키. - RTL(Right-To-Left) 레이아웃도 지원합니다.
  • 기능 설정을 변경하려면 상단 표시줄에서 확장 프로그램을 클릭하여 확장 프로그램의 옵션 메뉴를 엽니다.
사용하는 방법: 1. 브라우저에 확장 프로그램을 추가합니다. - 이미 TTV 또는 YT 탭이 열려 있는 경우 새로고침합니다.
  1. 사이드바/디렉토리의 스트리머 위로 마우스를 가져갑니다.
  2. 호버링된 스트림 옆에 미리보기가 나타납니다.
© MarkM. 이 확장 프로그램은 twitch.tv 또는 youtube.com과 관련이 없습니다.

Verifique a lista de recursos abaixo para obter mais recursos de melhoria da qualidade de vida.

<b>Recursos:</b> <b>* Twitch:</b> - Imagens ou visualizações de stream de vídeo ao vivo na barra lateral e diretórios. - Pré-visualizar redimensionamento e controle de volume. - Streaming: veja a miniatura de sua própria transmissão ao vivo conforme vista pelos espectadores. - Lista de canais favoritos da barra lateral. - Lista de canais do YouTube da barra lateral. - Multi Stream e Multi Chat. - Sobreposição de bate-papo transparente / dinâmica. - Tela cheia com modo de bate-papo. - Clicker de pontos de canal automático. - Downloader de clipes. - Atualização automática em erros do jogador (# 1000, # 2000, # 3000, # 4000). - Notificações de previsões quando você não sabe o que está acontecendo (por exemplo, se o seu bate-papo for fechado ou você não estiver na guia ou no navegador). - Predictions Sniper (participará das previsões para você). - Impedir mudança automática de qualidade de vídeo. - Procure streams usando as setas do teclado. - Fluxo de avanço rápido. - Stream de captura de tela. - FlashBang Defender. - Limpar botão de bate-papo. - Chat anônimo. - Imagem na imagem personalizada por meio do botão sob a contagem de visualizações na barra lateral. - Estenda automaticamente a barra lateral para mostrar todas as transmissões ao vivo (quando a barra lateral está aberta). - Pesquisa de transmissão da barra lateral: um botão de pesquisa roxo na parte superior da barra lateral para encontrar transmissões ao vivo facilmente na barra lateral. - Oculte todas as seções da barra lateral, exceto os canais seguidos. - Silenciar vídeos de reprodução automática em várias páginas. - Incorporação de vídeo avançada. - Ocultar sobreposições de extensões TTV. - Atalhos de teclado para recursos aplicáveis. - Também suporta layout invertido (quando o bate-papo está à esquerda e os streamers à direita). <b>* YouTube:</b> - Visualizações de imagem ou transmissão de vídeo ao vivo na barra lateral. - Pré-visualizar redimensionamento e controle de volume. - Definir automaticamente o reprodutor do YouTube para a qualidade selecionada. - Teatro / Tela cheia com modo de bate-papo. - Transmissão múltipla e bate-papo múltiplo. - Sobreposição de bate-papo transparente / dinâmico. - Fluxo de captura de tela. - Defensor FlashBang. - Controles de velocidade de reprodução do jogador. - Vá diretamente para transmissões ao vivo na barra lateral. - Mostre a contagem de visualizações dos streamers ao vivo na barra lateral. - Picture In Picture personalizado através do botão no cartão do canal na barra lateral. - Evite clicar para pausar / reproduzir o vídeo. - Botão Copiar URL no horário atual. - Atalhos de teclado para recursos aplicáveis. - Também suporta layout da direita para a esquerda (RTL).
  • Para alterar qualquer configuração de recurso, clique na extensão na barra superior para abrir o menu de opções da extensão.
Como usar: 1. Adicione a extensão ao seu navegador. - Se você já tiver uma guia TTV ou YT aberta - atualize-a.

description.en-US:
NAME automate-click - automate click actions that users might have to perform when visiting a website SYNOPSIS automate click actions that users might have to perform when visiting a website. For example accept or reject cookie consent messages. USER INPUTS
  • CSS selector of the to be clicked element (required)
  • Regular Expression matching the page url (required)
  • see OPTIONS for more
OPTIONS
  • Group: a single word/string (ref. https://tabulator.info/examples/6.3#grouping)
  • Tags: one or more space or "," seperated words
  • Annotation: some text to describe a rule
  • Inital Delay: ( number >= 0 ) delay befor the rule is executed after the page has finished loading
  • Repeat Delay: ( number >= 0 ) if a value greater than zero is entered, the action will be executed continuously with the given values as a millisecond delay between the repeats
  • Max Repeats: (number >=0) Defines an upper limit how often the "Repeats" should be done until the action is stopped (kind of like a failsafe, to not continue forever)
  • RRV (Random Repeat Variance): adds a random millisecond variance to the Repeat Delay, the number is the MAX variance offset so if you want the variance to randomly fluctuate between 10 seconds, you have to set it to 10000 and each cylce a random number from 0-10000 is picked as an offset for the Repeat Delay
  • CSS Selector: everything you can put into document.querySelectorAll (ref. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Document/querySelectorAll)
  • URL Regular Expression: RE to match the URLs where the rules should trigger (ref. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_expressions )
REQUIRED PERMISSIONS
  • storage: used to store the automation rules
  • webNavigation: used to monitor URL changes to detect matching automation rules
  • activeTab: used to pass the current tab url to the rules page to generate a inial regex
OPTIONAL PERMISSIONS none DEMO VIDEO https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f83b1464-94eb-4d6b-ac48-57dca6b5f634

Akce probíhají v prohlížeči ve vaší přihlášené relaci s nastavitelným tempem podobným ručnímu použití. PODPOROVANÉ STRÁNKY Úplný seznam: https://www.pelock.com/products/social-media-bot NÁVODY Videa krok za krokem: https://www.pelock.com/products/social-media-bot/tutorials PRO KOHO Chcete-li šetřit čas u opakujících se úkolů—v osobních projektech nebo v práci—Social Media Bot automatizuje práci: interakce s příspěvky a hashtagy a sledování účtů podle vašich cílů. CO AUTOMATIZUJE • Lajky, lajky u komentářů, sledování a zrušení sledování, reposty, záložky (podle možností každého webu) • Volitelné posouvání stránky, prodlevy a rozestupy mezi akcemi pro přirozenější chování VESTAVĚNÉ FUNKCE • Lokalizace do 45 jazyků • Snadná konfigurace • Režim plánovače 24/7 • Statistiky použití pro každou stránku • Oznámení webhooky • Ochrana proti spamu LOKÁLNĚ VE VAŠEM PROHLÍŽEČI Všechny operace probíhají na vašem počítači přes prohlížeč s vaší IP adresou a přihlášenou relací—podobně jako při ručním použití. Tempo a limity lze nastavit. JAK TO FUNGUJE Rozšíření opakuje akce, které byste provedli sami—podle vámi nastaveného plánu—včetně posouvání stránky, krátkých prodlev a limitů na relaci, které můžete upravit. HISTORIE VERZÍ https://www.pelock.com/products/social-media-bot/history VERZE ZDARMA Rozšíření můžete zdarma vyzkoušet s těmito omezeními: • Max. lajky / sledování na relaci: 10 • Max. kliků na interval: 1 • Bez podpory vývojáře PLNÁ VERZE Nákup tato omezení odstraňuje a zahrnuje podporu vývojáře. Platby: karta, PayPal, Bitcoin, ETH a SOL. https://www.pelock.com/products/social-media-bot/buy Ceny od 19 USD ročně (přibližně 1,6 USD měsíčně). PRÁVNÍ INFORMACE Všechny ochranné známky, loga a názvy patří příslušným vlastníkům. Názvy firem, produktů a služeb v tomto rozšíření slouží jen k identifikaci.
description.de: Social Media Bot ist ein automatischer Growbot, der routinemäßige Aktionen in unterstützten Netzwerken automatisiert—darunter X, TikTok, Bluesky, Medium, Vinted und andere—wie Likes, Likes für Kommentare, Folgen, Entfolgen, Reposts und Lesezeichen. Die Aktionen laufen in Ihrem Browser in Ihrer angemeldeten Sitzung ab, mit einstellbarem Tempo, das manuelle Nutzung nachahmen soll. UNTERSTÜTZTE WEBSITES Vollständige Liste: https://www.pelock.com/products/social-media-bot TUTORIALS Schritt-für-Schritt-Videos: https://www.pelock.com/products/social-media-bot/tutorials FÜR WEN ES GEDACHT IST Wenn Sie Zeit bei wiederkehrenden Aufgaben sparen möchten—ob für private Projekte oder die Arbeit—hilft Social Media Bot bei der Automatisierung: Interaktion mit Beiträgen und Hashtags sowie dem Folgen von Konten, die zu Ihren Zielen passen. WAS ES AUTOMATISIERT • Likes, Likes für Kommentare, Folgen und Entfolgen, Reposts, Lesezeichen (sofern die jeweilige Website es unterstützt) • Optionales Scrollen, Verzögerungen und Abstände zwischen Aktionen für natürlicher wirkende Nutzung EINGEBAUTE FUNKTIONEN • Lokalisierung in 45 Sprachen • Einfache Konfiguration • 24/7-Planermodus • Nutzungsstatistiken pro Website • Webhook-Benachrichtigungen • Schutz vor Spam LOKAL, IN IHREM BROWSER Alle Vorgänge laufen auf Ihrem Computer über Ihren Browser, mit Ihrer IP-Adresse und Ihrer angemeldeten Sitzung—ähnlich wie bei manueller Nutzung. Tempo und Grenzen sind einstellbar. description.en-US:
Frustrated when a website blocks right-click, copy, or text selection?

RightClick Unlocker removes these restrictions and restores full control over how you interact with web pages. It allows you to right-click, copy content, paste text, and select information on websites that normally disable these basic features.

Whether you are researching, studying, coding, or saving important content, this extension ensures your browser works the way it should.

Enable Right Click on Any Website

Many websites disable the right-click menu to prevent users from accessing standard browser features. RightClick Unlocker restores the context menu so you can use it normally.

You can:

• Open links in new tabs
• Save images and files
• Inspect elements
• Access browser tools

Browse without unnecessary restrictions.

Unlock Copy and Paste

Some websites block copy and paste functionality, making it difficult to use content efficiently. This extension restores clipboard functionality so standard shortcuts work again.

You can:

• Copy text from articles and blogs
• Copy code from developer resources
• Save study material and notes
• Paste content without limitations

Use your browser without interference.

Enable Text Selection

Certain websites disable text highlighting to prevent content extraction. RightClick Unlocker re-enables text selection so you can interact with content freely.

Useful for:

• Research and note-taking
• Studying online material
• Collecting references
• Saving important information

Smart Auto-Disable Timer

To maintain stability on complex websites, RightClick Unlocker includes an optional automatic disable timer.

This feature allows you to:

• Automatically disable unlocking after a set duration
• Prevent conflicts with website scripts
• Maintain smooth browsing
• Control when features are active

Lightweight and Fast

RightClick Unlocker is designed for performance and efficiency.

• Minimal CPU and memory usage
• No impact on browsing speed
• Instant activation when needed
• Runs quietly in the background

Privacy Focused

Your privacy is fully protected.

• No data collection
• No tracking
• No external data transmission
• All processing happens locally in your browser

How It Works

The extension detects when a website blocks right-click, copy, paste, or text selection and removes those restrictions instantly.

No manual setup required.

Why Choose RightClick Unlocker

RightClick Unlocker restores essential browser functionality and improves productivity by removing unnecessary limitations.

Ideal for users who want to:

• Enable right-click on restricted websites
• Unlock copy and paste
• Allow text selection
• Bypass website interaction restrictions
• Improve workflow and efficiency

summary.en-US: Unlock right-click, copy, paste, and text selection on any website. Break free from restrictions with one click!
Auto clicks the German embassy VISA links

release_notes.en-US:
Fixes "buttons don't react" on many sites.
  • Submit buttons now submit. Links now navigate.
  • Clicks on text or icons inside a button now reach the button.
  • Modern frameworks that only listen to pointer events (React, Vue, Svelte) now register clicks.
  • Pick Target keeps working through single-page-app re-renders.
  • Clearer error message when nothing is clickable, instead of a stuck "0 clicks".
  • Start button now waits for you to move the mouse over the page first, with a hint explaining why.

description.en-US:
Stop clicking the same button over and over. Set your speed, pick a target or follow your cursor, press Start. Done.
  • 1 to 6,000 clicks per minute
  • Cursor mode: clicks wherever your mouse is
  • Target mode: pick a specific element on the page
  • Live click counter
  • Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+Y / Cmd+Shift+Y) to toggle
  • Stops completely when you hit Stop
Great for forms, games, testing your own apps, or anything that needs repeated clicks.

summary.en-US: Auto-click at any speed. Pick a target or follow your cursor. No tracking. No data leaves your device.

Adds the following features:

- Auto-clicker at 100ms. By default, this is disabled; click the text in the bottom-right that gets added to the page to enable it. The auto-clicker will not start until you've caught your first Pokemon.
- Special "Speedrun Save" that is automatically overwritten instead of cluttering your save list.

You probably shouldn't use this if you're not speedrunning! But you can if you want, I'm not your mom!

description.en-GB:
When activated, at an interval of one minute, this Firefox add-on searches for the Connect button on a Colab notebook webpage and clicks it automatically. This action prevents the Colab session from shutting down, possibly losing precious undergoing trainings of your ML/DL models. 

To fire the extension up, when on a Colab page, simply click on its icon and it will start clicking the Connect button every minute. The extension won't start on pages other than Colab.

summary.en-GB: Automatically clicks every minute the Connect button on a Colab page to prevent it from shutting down.

description.en-GB:
Super Auto Clicker Pro is a powerful, feature-rich automation tool designed for web developers, testers, and users who need to automate repetitive clicking tasks. ✨ Key Features Dual Click Modes: - 🎯 Targeted Mode: Click specific elements using CSS selectors (ID, class, or any valid selector) - 🖱️ Cursor Follow Mode: Automatically click whatever element is under your mouse cursor Precision Control: - Customizable interval timing (minimum 10ms for optimal performance) - Randomized delay option (±20% variance) to mimic natural human behavior and avoid bot detection - Real-time click counter to track your automation User-Friendly Interface: - Modern, beautiful dark mode design - Intuitive controls with Start/Stop buttons - Live status indicator - Visual ripple effects show exactly where clicks occur Keyboard Shortcuts: - Ctrl+Shift+S - Start auto-clicking - Ctrl+Shift+X - Stop auto-clicking Privacy & Performance: - Zero data collection - completely private - Efficient memory management with proper cleanup - Settings persist across sessions - No external dependencies 🎯 Perfect For:
  • Web developers testing click interactions
  • QA testers automating repetitive test cases
  • Gamers automating repetitive actions
  • Anyone with repetitive clicking tasks
  • Accessibility users who need clicking assistance
🛡️ Safe & Secure This extension respects your privacy: - No data collection or tracking - No external server connections - All settings stored locally - Open source approach 💡 How to Use
  1. Click the extension icon to open the control panel
  2. Choose your mode (Targeted or Cursor Follow)
  3. For Targeted mode: Enter a CSS selector like #myButton or .click-me
  4. Set your desired interval in milliseconds
  5. Optionally enable randomized delay for more natural clicking
  6. Click Start or press Ctrl+Shift+S
  7. Watch the real-time counter track your clicks!
🔧 Technical Excellence
  • Built with modern JavaScript (ES6+)
  • Manifest V2 compliant
  • Optimized for Firefox 140+
  • Comprehensive error handling
  • Memory leak prevention

summary.en-GB: Advanced auto-clicker with CSS selector targeting and cursor follow modes. Features precision timing (10ms minimum), randomized delays, visual feedback, hotkey support, and real-time statistics. Perfect for automation, testing, and repetitive tasks.
